details: The agent successfully navigated to the Wikipedia article and extracted complete, accurate data. It correctly identified all co-laureates for the 3 most recent years: 2025 (John Clarke, Michel H. Devoret, John M. Martinis), 2024 (John J. Hopfield, Geoffrey Hinton), and 2023 (Pierre Agostini, Ferenc Krausz, Anne L'Huillier). The 2024 and 2023 results match the known facts exactly. The 2025 data was read directly from the live Wikipedia page which has been updated since the known facts were written.
